since_last: 70% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.84%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 70% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.32% · BTC +0.94% · Gold +1.61% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 70% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.84%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.84%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.73%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at +10.33%
cards.body: Leaders: KLAC +10.33%, ARM +9.93%, AMAT +9.32%, LRCX +9.26%, MU +8.22%. Laggards: AVAV -5.73%, SOUN -4.86%, PLTR -3.49%, CRM -2.87%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.17% at $150.04
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.17% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
